description_long: This modern bungalow features a sleek, rectangular design with a combination of white and wood-textured exterior walls. Large floor-to-ceiling windows dominate the main living areas, providing ample natural light and a strong connection to the outdoors. The structure is set on a sloped terrain, with a raised deck area supported by posts and a spacious patio beneath. The roof is a simple, dark gable style, and the building includes multiple entry points, including a prominent glass door and a ramp for accessibility. The landscaping integrates the house into the hillside, with retaining walls and steps leading to different levels. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, emphasizing clean lines and open spaces.
description: A modern, minimalist bungalow with white and wood-textured walls, large glass windows, and a dark gable roof, set on a sloped landscape with a raised deck and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, and the raised deck with wood paneling.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, ramp access, and the integration of the house into the sloped terrain.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long patio, additional windows, and the retaining wall along the slope.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the glass-walled section, deck, and the overall linear form of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass walls
